con:config.script: def base = context.expand('${#Project#baseUrl}') def envelope = '''<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock"> <soap:Body><tns:ListInterviewsRequest/></soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>''' def conn = new URL("${base}/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("Content-Type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.write(envelope.bytes) assert conn.responseCode == 401 : "Expected 401 without WS-Security, got ${conn.responseCode}" log.info("SOAP no auth returns 401: OK")

def base = context.expand('${#Project#baseUrl}') def user = context.expand('${#Project#wsUser}') def pass = context.expand('${#Project#wsPass}') def envelope = """<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock" xmlns:wsse="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd"> <soap:Header> <wsse:Security> <wsse:UsernameToken> <wsse:Username>${user}</wsse:Username> <wsse:Password>${pass}</wsse:Password> </wsse:UsernameToken> </wsse:Security> </soap:Header> <soap:Body><tns:ListInterviewsRequest/></soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>""" def conn = new URL("${base}/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("Content-Type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.write(envelope.bytes) assert conn.responseCode == 200 : "Expected 200, got ${conn.responseCode}" def body = conn.inputStream.text assert body.contains('ListInterviewsResponse') log.info("SOAP ListInterviews: OK")

def base = context.expand('${#Project#baseUrl}') def user = context.expand('${#Project#wsUser}') def pass = context.expand('${#Project#wsPass}') def envelope = """<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:tns="urn:interview-mock" xmlns:wsse="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd"> <soap:Header> <wsse:Security> <wsse:UsernameToken> <wsse:Username>${user}</wsse:Username> <wsse:Password>${pass}</wsse:Password> </wsse:UsernameToken> </wsse:Security> </soap:Header> <soap:Body> <tns:GetInterviewRequest><tns:id>INT-002</tns:id></tns:GetInterviewRequest> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>""" def conn = new URL("${base}/soap").openConnection() conn.requestMethod = "POST" conn.setRequestProperty("Content-Type", "text/xml; charset=utf-8") conn.doOutput = true conn.outputStream.write(envelope.bytes) assert conn.responseCode == 200 def body = conn.inputStream.text assert body.contains('GetInterviewResponse') assert body.contains('82') assert body.contains('HIRE') log.info("SOAP GetInterview INT-002: OK")
